title: Jurassic World Rebirth
shortSynopsis: On a mission to find dinosaur DNA for a miracle drug, a team of experts must fight to survive against the remote island's carnivorous inhabitants.

title: KPop Demon Hunters
shortSynopsis: When K-pop superstars Rumi, Mira and Zoey aren't selling out stadiums, they're using their secret powers to protect their fans from supernatural threats.

title: The Addams Family
shortSynopsis: Leading gloomy lives in isolation, a family of ghouls moves to a bland suburb where a reality TV show host's community plan cramps their style.

title: Hierarchy
shortSynopsis: On the eve of their biggest heist yet, two brothers' tightly run crime operation starts to unravel when a volatile figure from their past returns.

title: The Addams Family 2
shortSynopsis: Worried that Wednesday and Pugsley are growing up too fast, Gomez piles the Addams brood into a haunted camper for a family road trip across the US.

title: The World Will Tremble
shortSynopsis: During WWII, a group of Jewish prisoners risks everything to escape a death camp and alert the world to the Nazis' horrific plans. Based on a true story.

title: Trap House
shortSynopsis: An undercover agent races to stop and save his own son after the teen and his friends use DEA intelligence to rob a dangerous cartel's stash house.

title: Joe’s College Road Trip
shortSynopsis: To teach his sheltered grandson about the real world, Madea's foul-mouthed brother Joe takes the college-bound teen on a raucous cross-country road trip.

title: The Expendables 4
shortSynopsis: New blood, veteran warriors, one mission. Elite mercenaries unite to form a hardened front against a looming global threat.

title: The Rip
shortSynopsis: Trust frays when a team of Miami cops discovers millions in cash inside a run-down stash house, calling everyone — and everything — into question.

title: Firebreak
shortSynopsis: Little Lide disappears in the forest while her family packs up their home. As a fire breaks out, her mother must race to reach her before the flames do.

title: Accused
shortSynopsis: A renowned gynecologist's life unravels as serious allegations threaten her career and marriage, while her wife seeks to uncover the truth.

title: The Orphans
shortSynopsis: Two childhood friends must overcome their differences when their old flame dies in a suspicious car accident and her teenage daughter seeks revenge.

title: Pavane
shortSynopsis: Three lonely strangers meet at their department store jobs and find solace in each other's company while they explore connection and the nature of love.

title: #SalveRosa
shortSynopsis: After an incident at school, a teen influencer begins to question her online persona and uncovers secrets that threaten her life as she knows it.

title: The Trip 8
shortSynopsis: A couple's romantic honeymoon hits a snag when their in-laws crash their vacation, determined to break them up to keep a shocking family secret hidden.

title: A Father's Miracle
shortSynopsis: A devoted father is wrongfully imprisoned for a crime he didn't commit, leaving his daughter to fend for herself as he fights to prove his innocence.

title: The Swedish Connection
shortSynopsis: In this little-known true story, a Swedish bureaucrat becomes an unlikely war hero as he attempts to save Jewish lives during the darkest days of WWII.

title: Dhurandhar
shortSynopsis: In the early 2000s, an undercover operative infiltrates Karachi's underworld, breaking into its inner circle to dismantle a violent nexus from within.

title: Meet, Greet & Bye
shortSynopsis: When a devoted mother with cancer wishes to meet her favorite K-drama idol, her children unite to make it happen, in hopes that she'll keep fighting.

title: Bridgerton: Season 4
shortSynopsis: In a new tale from the ton, eternal bachelor Benedict Bridgerton finally meets his match: a captivating lady's maid in disguise at a masquerade ball.

title: The Night Agent: Season 3
shortSynopsis: Peter teams with a reporter to expose the elusive Broker and stop a terrorist attack, unaware that a powerful conspiracy is plotting to bury the truth.

title: Reality Check: Inside America's Next Top Model: Season 1
shortSynopsis: Models, judges and "ANTM" insiders — including Tyra Banks — look back at the reality show's complicated legacy in this eye-opening documentary series.

title: Love Is Blind: Ohio
shortSynopsis: Come for the meet cutes, stay for the wedding bells. Hopeful romantics fall in love based solely on their inner beauty in this hit dating experiment.

title: The Night Agent: Season 1
shortSynopsis: While monitoring an emergency line, a vigilant FBI agent answers a call that plunges him into a deadly conspiracy involving a mole at the White House.

title: The Lincoln Lawyer: Season 4
shortSynopsis: On trial for a murder he didn't commit, Mickey must face a relentless DA as he fights to prove his innocence, expose the real killer and save his firm.

title: Raw: 2026 - February 23, 2026
shortSynopsis: Atlanta celebrates the phenomenal career of AJ Styles. The two final qualifiers round out the Elimination Chamber Matches.

title: The Night Agent: Season 2
shortSynopsis: The hunt for a CIA agent accused of leaking secrets puts Peter and Rose in the crosshairs of a ruthless intelligence broker and a deadly war criminal.

title: Formula 1: Drive to Survive: Season 8
shortSynopsis: In Formula 1's 75th year, rookies surge forward and a title-winning team faces turmoil as a three-way contest for the world championship grips the grid.

title: Being Gordon Ramsay: Season 1
shortSynopsis: Follow celeb chef Gordon Ramsay behind the scenes as he juggles family life, global empire and his biggest launch yet in this all-you-can-eat documentary.

title: The Art of Sarah: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: A body found in the middle of town. A luxe label on the rise. A detective tests every stitch of a woman's story that keeps changing. What really happened?

title: BAKI-DOU: The Invincible Samurai: Season 1
shortSynopsis: Baki and the strongest Underground Arena fighters face a threat of historical proportions: the resurrected Musashi Miyamoto, Japan's greatest samurai.

title: Unfamiliar: Season 1
shortSynopsis: When the past catches up with two former spies, their biggest challenge isn't car chases, shootouts or fistfights — it's telling each other the truth.

title: The Museum of Innocence: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: In 1970s Istanbul, a man's forbidden love for a shop-girl evolves into a lifelong journey of obsession and longing. Based on Orhan Pamuk's iconic novel.

title: In the Mud: Season 2
shortSynopsis: Same prison, deadly inmates and the return of Borges. At La Quebrada, deals and favors are part of survival... until it's every woman for herself.

title: Lead Children: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: When a young doctor discovers that children living near a smelting plant suffer from lead poisoning, she risks her career and safety to save them.

title: Undercover Miss Hong: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: A tenacious investigator goes undercover at a securities firm to expose corruption, but her mission is complicated by its new CEO — her former lover.

title: No Tail to Tell: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: Imbued with the power to grant wishes, a cynical nine-tailed fox's life takes a turn when she encounters a soccer player — altering both of their fates.

title: Can This Love Be Translated?: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: The emotions of a celebrity and her interpreter get lost in translation as they travel the world filming a TV show. Will love find its own language?

title: Salvador: Season 1
shortSynopsis: On a night of violent clashes, an ambulance driver learns his daughter is involved with hooligans. When things spiral, he'll stop at nothing for answers.
